changes.summary: Added WALLET_PERSISTENCE_PORT token, WalletPersistencePort interface, and domain transaction/session types for BC-02 wallet + ledger persistence.
Added VOTE_PERSISTENCE_PORT token, VotePersistencePort interface, and VoteRecord/CreateVoteInput domain types for BC-04 vote persistence.
Mongoose wallet/transaction document ↔ WalletSnapshot and WalletTransactionRecord mappers (sole wallet mapper location).
Mongoose vote document ↔ VoteRecord mapper (sole vote mapper location).
WalletPersistenceAdapter implements WalletPersistencePort; owns all Mongoose wallet/transaction queries, aggregations, and merit-history dashboard logic moved from WalletService.
VotePersistenceAdapter implements VotePersistencePort; owns all Mongoose vote CRUD/query/aggregation operations moved from VoteService.
Nest PersistenceModule registers Mongoose feature schemas and binds wallet/vote persistence port providers.
Removed @InjectModel/@InjectConnection; injects WALLET_PERSISTENCE_PORT and delegates all persistence to the port.
Removed @InjectModel/@InjectConnection; injects VOTE_PERSISTENCE_PORT and delegates all persistence to the port.
Imports PersistenceModule so WALLET_PERSISTENCE_PORT and VOTE_PERSISTENCE_PORT resolve for WalletService and VoteService.

verification.tsc: no errors in changed files (project tsconfig has pre-existing TS5101 baseUrl deprecation)

notes: Service and domain.module wiring updated outside nominal write_set to satisfy success criteria (same pattern as p6-invest-tappalka-ucs router delegation).
